Benefits: Wherever the truth lies, you gain an additional use of one of your gnome magic spell-like abilities each day. This does not always have to be the same spell-like ability—one day you might use dancing lights twice, only to use the additional casting for speak with animals the next day.

accelerated drinker.name: Accelerated Drinker
accelerated drinker.description:
You know how to drink a potion efficiently, such as by not using your hands, tossing it in the air and catching it in your mouth, or opening it with your teeth.

Benfits

You may drink a potion as a move action instead of a standard action as long as you start your turn with the potion in your hand.

keleshite trade camel (camel).name: Keleshite Trade Camel (Camel)
keleshite trade camel (camel).description:
Requirements: Camel

Benefits: Once per hour, a Keleshite trade camel can regurgitate the contents of its stomach, spitting the foul material at a single target within 10 feet as a ranged touch attack. The target must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC = 10 + half the camel’s Hit Dice + the camel’s Constitution modifier) or be nauseated for 1 round.

slaver (human; ombo).name: Slaver (Human; Ombo)
slaver (human; ombo).description:
You may never have participated in a single slave raid, but members of other tribes recognize you as Ombo, and they fear and distrust you accordingly.

Requirements: Ombo Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks to influence non-Ombo Mwangi, but you suffer a -2 penalty on Bluff or Diplomacy checks to influence them.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus  to influence non-Ombo Mwangi.
-[[2]]  penalty  to influence non-Ombo Mwangi.
-[[2]]  penalty  to influence non-Ombo Mwangi.

huldra's luck (lands of the linnorm king.name: Huldra's Luck (Lands of the Linnorm Kings)
huldra's luck (lands of the linnorm king.description:
At some point in your life, you were touched by a fey creature called a huldra and inherited a bit of its luck.

Requirements: Lands of the Linnorm Kings

Benefits: Once per day, you may choose to gain a +1 luck bonus on a single saving throw, attack roll, or skill check.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you may choose to gain a +[[1]] Luck bonus on a single saving throw, attack roll, or skill check. ([[@resources.huldrasLuckLandsOfTheLinnormKings.value]] remaining uses)
Once per day, you may choose to gain a +[[1]] Luck bonus on a single saving throw, attack roll, or skill check. ([[@resources.huldrasLuckLandsOfTheLinnormKings.value]] remaining uses)
Once per day, you may choose to gain a +[[1]] Luck bonus on a single saving throw, attack roll, or skill check. ([[@resources.huldrasLuckLandsOfTheLinnormKings.value]] remaining uses)

heir of chu ye (tian xia).name: Heir of Chu Ye (Tian Xia)
heir of chu ye (tian xia).description:
Requirements: Tian Xia

Benefits: If you would take a penalty for using the Heal skill to treat deadly wounds without one or more uses of a healer’s kit, that penalty is reduced by 2 (minimum no penalty). Additionally, a creature can benefit from you treating its deadly wounds if you do so within 48 hours of its injury instead of within 24 hours.

contextNotes.text: If you would take a penalty to treat deadly wounds without one or more uses of a healer’s kit, that penalty is reduced by 2 (minimum no penalty). Additionally, a creature can benefit from you treating its deadly wounds if you do so within 48 hours of its injury.

among humans (kitsune).name: Among Humans (Kitsune)
among humans (kitsune).description:
You have spent your entire life living among humans and are an expert at impersonating them.

Requirements: Kitsune

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Disguise checks to appear human while assuming your specific human form with the change shape racial trait, and Disguise is always a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus  to appear human while assuming your specific human form with the change shape racial trait.

demonblight reistance.name: Demonblight Reistance
demonblight reistance.description:
Your exposure to powerful energies instilled in you a supernatural resistance to diseases, particularly those of a demonic bent.

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on saving throws against diseases you are exposed to while fighting one or more creatures of the demon subtype, or while such a hostile creature is within 100 feet.

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] on saving throws vs diseases when fighting one or more demons or while hostile demons are within 100 feet.

priest-blessed.name: Priest-Blessed
priest-blessed.description:
You were guided to maturity by a trusted priest of an ecclesiastical tradition, who inspired you and made you understand that the authority exerted by a religious hierarchy is a blessing rather than a restriction, allowing the faithful to always feel confident in their direction and the righteousness of the guided actions. Now, your faith wells up whenever you are aided by divine magic, and you find it easy to open up to the magic and succor of any faith, seeing the similarities between all such traditions.

Benefits: Three times per day when you are the target of a harmless divine spell, you may increase its caster level by 1 for purposes of its effect on you alone.

contextNotes.text: Three times per day when you are the target of a harmless divine spell, you may increase its caster level by 1 for purposes of its effect on you alone.

partial protege.name: Partial Protege
partial protege.description:
You are adept at disguising your true talents.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks and on Use Magic Device checks made to emulate a class feature.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on Use Magic Device checks made to emulate a class feature.

proud tribesman (human; mwangi).name: Proud Tribesman (Human; Mwangi)
proud tribesman (human; mwangi).description:
You may have to coexist with the colonials, but you don't have to like them.

Requirements: Mwangi Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 bonus on checks to Intimidate colonial Sargavans.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against colonial Sargavans

inquisitive archaeologist (mummy's mask).name: Inquisitive Archaeologist (Mummy's Mask)
inquisitive archaeologist (mummy's mask).description:
You have studied the architectural styles of nations throughout the Inner Sea region, but none have fascinated you like the architecture of Ancient Osirion. Hearing that the famed necropolis of Wati has finally been opened for exploration, you’ve come to that city to get firsthand experience with the lost secrets of Ancient Osirion’s master builders.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (engineering) checks, and that skill is always a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Perception checks to find concealed or secret doors in structures built in the style of Ancient Osirion.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to find concealed or secret doors in structures built in the style of Ancient Osirion.

my word is my bond (human; taldan).name: My Word Is My Bond (Human; Taldan)
my word is my bond (human; taldan).description:
Your reliability is a core part of your self-image.

Requirements: Taldan Human Heritage

Benefits: Once per day, you can gain a +1 trait bonus on an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check if success on that check is directly relevant to fulfilling a verbal or written agreement you have made. You must choose to use this trait before rolling, and this ability does not work if you initiated the agreement for the purpose of activating this ability.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can gain a +1 trait bonus on an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check if success on that check is directly relevant to fulfilling a verbal or written agreement you have made. You must choose to use this trait before rolling, and this ability does not work if you initiated the agreement for the purpose of activating this ability.

Once per day, you can gain a +1 trait bonus on an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check if success on that check is directly relevant to fulfilling a verbal or written agreement you have made. You must choose to use this trait before rolling, and this ability does not work if you initiated the agreement for the purpose of activating this ability.

Once per day, you can gain a +1 trait bonus on an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check if success on that check is directly relevant to fulfilling a verbal or written agreement you have made. You must choose to use this trait before rolling, and this ability does not work if you initiated the agreement for the purpose of activating this ability.

beastspeaker (the concordance).name: Beastspeaker (The Concordance)
beastspeaker (the concordance).description:
You are skillful at communicating with animals as well as creatures with an affinity for the elements.

Requirements: The Concordance

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on wild empathy checks. When you use wild empathy to influence a magical beast with the air, earth, fire, or water subtype, you do not take the typical –4 penalty for influencing a magical beast.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on wild empathy checks. When you use wild empathy to influence a magical beast with the air, earth, fire, or water subtype, you do not take the typical –4 penalty for influencing a magical beast.

thrill seeker (rise of the runelords).name: Thrill Seeker (Rise of the Runelords)
thrill seeker (rise of the runelords).description:
You’ve grown up in or around Sandpoint and are the heir to your family’s modest farm, shop, or fishing boat, but you’ve always dreamed of more. Searching for a taste of excitement, you’ve come into town to participate in this year’s Swallowtail festival.

Benefits: The thrill of danger grants you an additional +5 feet of movement during the first round of any combat. Additionally, you begin play with three @UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-items.Item.iOndtehj1BpQmXjN]{star candle fireworks} (see Ultimate Equipment).

contextNotes.text: +[[5]] feet of movement during the first round of any combat.

aerial observer (sylph).name: Aerial Observer (Sylph)
aerial observer (sylph).description:
You are practiced at noticing details from high up.

Requirements: Sylph

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Perception checks while you are at least 30 feet above ground level.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus while you are at least 30 feet above ground level.

whisper woods hunter (whisper woods).name: Whisper Woods Hunter (Whisper Woods)
whisper woods hunter (whisper woods).description:
Your family prepared you for a life of evading or destroying fiendish creatures.

Requirements: Whisper Woods

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks to track evil outsiders and a +2 trait bonus on initiative checks when you know your opponent is an evil outsider.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to track evil outsiders.
+[[2]] Trait bonus when you know your opponent is an evil outsider.

magic's might (yuelral).name: Magic's Might (Yuelral)
magic's might (yuelral).description:
Your natural affinity for magic allows you to affect even those who resist it.

Requirements: Yuelral

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks to overcome spell resistance.

merabian mentorship (thuvia; suli).name: Merabian Mentorship (Thuvia; Suli)
merabian mentorship (thuvia; suli).description:
You were apprenticed to a renowned alchemist of Merab, and she taught you how to recognize elemental reagents by taste.

Requirements: Suli native to Thuvia

Benefits: Upon imbibing a potion containing a spell on your formula list of a spell level you are capable of casting, you can attempt a Spellcraft check (DC 15 + extract level). On a success, you can immediately add the spell to your formula book.

varisian wanderer (varisia).name: Varisian Wanderer (Varisia)
varisian wanderer (varisia).description:
You were raised among or have spent time with a group of Varisian nomads, whether travelers, Sczarni criminals, or entertainers, and have learned their ways.

Requirements: Varisia

Benefits: Choose one of the following skills: Perform (choose one type), Profession (fortuneteller), or Sleight of Hand. You gain a +1 trait bonus on this skill, and it is always a class skill for you.

Usage: Select one (1) of Perform (choose one type), Profession (fortuneteller), or Sleight of Hand when you take this trait.

If you selected a Perform type or Profession (fortuneteller), update the Skills tab of your Actor to add the chosen skill.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the Change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

artisan.name: Artisan
artisan.description:
You spent time working under artisans, or your parents were artisans who were particularly skilled at their trade.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on a single Craft skill (your choice).

Usage: In Changes tab, change the bonus' target from Craft to Craft (your choice).

undine loyalty (undine).name: Undine Loyalty (Undine)
undine loyalty (undine).description:
You learned early on that teamwork can help keep you safe from troublemakers.

Requirements: Undine

Benefits: Choose one teamwork feat that requires an ally with the same feat to be adjacent to you. You may benefit from that teamwork feat as long as you have an ally within 10 feet of you (though your ally does not benefit from the teamwork feat unless it also has this trait or a similar ability).

imposing scion.name: Imposing Scion
imposing scion.description:
The reputation of your bloodline grants you a degree of fearful respect.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks. If your bloodline is keyed to a specific creature type, your trait bonus increases to +2 when interacting with creatures of that type.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] when interacting with creatures types keyed to your bloodline.

lamia's bane.name: Lamia's Bane
lamia's bane.description:
You have been exposed to the magical energies of lamias in your past, or you have heard innumerable stories about your family’s dealings with lamias, and you have built up a resistance to their charms.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against enchantment effects and a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against the spells and spell-like abilities of lamias.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against enchantment effects.
+[[2]] Trait bonus on saving throws against the spells and spell-like abilities of lamias.

ritualistic (strange aeons).name: Ritualistic (Strange Aeons)
ritualistic (strange aeons).description:
You awake with a sense of purpose and a tingle of magical power. Though it’s unsettling that you can’t recall your past, you have a hunch that if you and your companions do everything just right—follow the correct steps and order—the answers will reveal themselves and you will be free of your condition. You get the feeling that you’ve always fallen back on careful planning and time-tested evidence in the past, but a nagging sensation also tells you that you used these skills in less-than-kind ways all too recently.

Benefits: Choose one 0-level spell. You can cast this spell once per day as a spell-like ability with a caster level equal to your character level. The spell-like ability’s save DC is Charisma-based. In addition, you gain a +2 trait bonus on all skill checks when performing occult rituals.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when performing occult rituals.

precise treatment.name: Precise Treatment
precise treatment.description:
You treat others with a clear and calculating intellect.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Heal checks, and you may use your Intelligence modifier when making Heal checks instead of your Wisdom modifier.

Usage: On your character's sheet, go to the Skills tab and click on the lock icon to unlock the skill configurations. Find the Heal skill and change the ability modifier from Wis to Int.

equality for all (halfling; andoran).name: Equality for All (Halfling; Andoran)
equality for all (halfling; andoran).description:
Even when facing foes much larger than yourself, you still embody the Andoran ethos of liberty.

Requirements: Halfling; Andoran

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus to your CMB and your CMD when facing opponents who are at least two sizes larger than you.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when facing opponents who are at least two sizes larger than you.
+[[2]] Trait bonus when facing opponents who are at least two sizes larger than you.

empyreal cultist (varisia; magnimar).name: Empyreal Cultist (Varisia; Magnimar)
empyreal cultist (varisia; magnimar).description:
Your faith in the empyreal lords—a host of good demigods—and your fascination with the legendary Angel of the Arvensoar have you constantly on the hopeful lookout for celestial messengers.

Requirements: Magnimar in Varisia

Benefits: Choose an empyreal lord as your patron deity. You gain Celestial as a bonus language and a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks when dealing with good-aligned humanoids.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus when dealing with good-aligned humanoids.

sound of mind (zi ha).name: Sound of Mind (Zi Ha)
sound of mind (zi ha).description:
You have lived in the mountains of Zi Ha and found utter tranquility among the samsarans of the region.

Requirements: Zi Ha

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting effects.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects.

weapon style (lantern lodge ).name: Weapon Style (Lantern Lodge )
weapon style (lantern lodge ).description:
Requirements: Lantern Lodge

Benefits: You gain proficiency with one weapon that has the monk special weapon quality (see page 145 of the Core Rulebook).

Usage

Select one weapon with the monk special weapon quality when you take this trait.

Update the Granted Proficiencies>Weapon Proficiencies section of the details tab of this trait to reflect this choice.

fiendish confidence (asmodeus).name: Fiendish Confidence (Asmodeus)
fiendish confidence (asmodeus).description:
You expect to be obeyed and are rarely proven wrong.

Requirements: Asmodeus

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks and Intimidate becomes a class skill for you.

rice runner (wanshou).name: Rice Runner (Wanshou)
rice runner (wanshou).description:
You grew up as a slave in Wanshou, harvesting rice for your kraken despot, and you know how to move agilely across sodden and unsteady ground.

Requirements: Wanshou

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks, and Acrobatics becomes a class skill for you.

snowbound.name: Snowbound
snowbound.description:
You came of age in a place with harsh winters amid a culture that rewarded you for testing your limits in the cold.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against cold effects and a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saves against the effects of cold weather.

Suggested Characters

Irriseni, Kellids, Ulfen

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against cold effects.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against the effects of cold weather.

opportunistic (calistria).name: Opportunistic (Calistria)
opportunistic (calistria).description:
You have learned to recognize openings that your foes leave, and you know how to take advantage of them.

Requirements: Calistria

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity when using a dagger, sword, or whip. 

Usage: You may add a Conditional Modifier to any attacks on your Actor with any dagger, sword, or whip.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attacks of opportunity when using a dagger, sword, or whip.

dwarf-trained (giantslayer).name: Dwarf-Trained (Giantslayer)
dwarf-trained (giantslayer).description:
Dwarves are well acquainted with the threats posed by giants and orcs, and they have spent centuries honing their techniques for fighting these foes. You have trained with the dwarves and have learned some of the tactics they use against their hated enemies.

Requirements: Cannot be a dwarf or gnome

Benefits: You gain a +2 dodge bonus to AC against creatures with the giant subtype (this does not stack with the bonus granted by the defensive training racial trait of dwarves and gnomes) and a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against creatures with the orc subtype (this does not stack with the bonus granted by the dwarf hatred racial trait).

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Dodge bonus to AC against creatures with the giant subtype.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls against creatures with the orc subtype.

malign instrument (tiefling).name: Malign Instrument (Tiefling)
malign instrument (tiefling).description:
Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: Select a good-aligned deity. Add 1 to the DCs of your spells’ saves when targeting a good-aligned outsider or divine spellcaster who serves that deity.

contextNotes.text: Add 1 to the DCs of your spells’ saves when targeting a good-aligned outsider or divine spellcaster who serves the deity you chose.

vexing defender (giantslayer).name: Vexing Defender (Giantslayer)
vexing defender (giantslayer).description:
You’re trained in fighting opponents that are larger than you, and you are skilled at keeping them on their toes, pestering them from all directions.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks, and Acrobatics becomes a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +4 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks to move through an enemy’s space without provoking an attack of opportunity, provided that enemy is larger than you.

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to move through an enemy’s space without provoking an attack of opportunity, provided that enemy is larger than you.

water-touched.name: Water-Touched
water-touched.description:
You share an affinity with elemental water.

Benefits: You gain DR 1/— against creatures and attacks with the water type.

contextNotes.text: DR 1/— against creatures and attacks with the water type.

chelish guerrilla (cheliax).name: Chelish Guerrilla (Cheliax)
chelish guerrilla (cheliax).description:
In overthrowing House Thrune, you’ve spent many years training to face the diabolist nobles and the devils they bind.

Requirements: Cheliax

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge checks to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses) and a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against devils.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  on weapon damage rolls against devils.
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).
+[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify devils (and their special powers and weaknesses).

fungal brewing (dwarf).name: Fungal Brewing (Dwarf)
fungal brewing (dwarf).description:
Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Craft checks to create alchemical items, and can create nonmagical alchemical materials in 20% less time than normal.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to create alchemical items and you can create nonmagical alchemical materials in 20% less time than normal.

inspired by greatness (carrion crown).name: Inspired by Greatness (Carrion Crown)
inspired by greatness (carrion crown).description:
Whether you knew Professor Lorrimor well or only in passing, as a colleague or competitor, his career and lifetime of discovery inspired you to be better at what you do. As you honed your craft, you and the professor corresponded, and he was delighted to hear that he had directly or indirectly motivated you to strive for your full potential. Saddened by the news of his death, you feel that you should honor his memory by fulfilling his final wishes and attending his funeral, and by ever striving to attain greater heights and someday match the influence and impact of your idol.

Benefits: Choose one spell you can cast. From now on, you always cast this spell at +1 caster level.

Usage: Select one spell when you take this trait.

Edit the chosen spell. In the Offsets Section>Caster Level Offset box enter a 1

skater's balance (kobold).name: Skater's Balance (Kobold)
skater's balance (kobold).description:
You grew up stalking across the frozen pools of water that dot your tribe’s Darklands home.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You don’t need to spend extra movement to enter a square of an ice sheet (Core Rulebook 430), and the DCs of your Acrobatics checks on ice sheets don’t increase by 5.

contextNotes.text: The DCs of your Acrobatics checks on ice sheets don’t increase by 5.

conspiracy hunter (council of thieves).name: Conspiracy Hunter (Council of Thieves)
conspiracy hunter (council of thieves).description:
You’ve long heard rumors of dark deeds afoot in Westcrown. Shipments of valuable cargo that go missing with nary a trace or question asked. People who disappear as though they never existed. Lords of business and nobles who speak in veiled references and accidental slips of masters even they must obey. What lords rule the Westcrown underworld? Do the tales of far-reaching criminal organizations hold a hint of truth? Could the fabled Council of Thieves, said to have been purged from the city ages ago, have somehow survived or reformed? And what hold do they hold over the city today? You don’t know, but you’re determined to find out!

Benefits: Choose one of the following skills: Bluff, Diplomacy, Knowledge (local), Perception, Sense Motive, or Stealth. You gain a +1 trait bonus on this skill and it is always considered a class skill for you.

Usage: Select Bluff, Diplomacy, Knowledge (local), Perception, Sense Motive, or Stealth when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

dangerously curious.name: Dangerously Curious
dangerously curious.description:
You have always been intrigued by magic, possibly because you were the child of a magician or priest. You often snuck into your parent's laboratory or shrine to tinker with spell components and magic devices, and often caused quite a bit of damage and headaches for your parent as a result.

Benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and Use Magic Device is always a class skill for you.

iron lungs (darklands).name: Iron Lungs (Darklands)
iron lungs (darklands).description:
Requirements: Darklands, usually under marshlands

Benefits: Due to the constant intrusion of marsh gases seeping into the tunnels and chambers of your lair, you can hold your breath for twice as long and gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against the effects of inhaled poisons.

Usage

Suffocation

source PRPG Core Rulebook pg. 445

A character who has no air to breathe can hold her breath for 2 rounds per point of Constitution.

If a character takes a standard or full-round action, the remaining duration that the character can hold her breath is reduced by 1 round.

After this period of time, the character must make a DC 10 Constitution check in order to continue holding her breath.

The check must be repeated each round, with the DC increasing by +1 for each previous success.

When the character fails one of these Constitution checks, she begins to suffocate.

In the first round, she falls unconscious (0 hit points).

In the following round, she drops to –1 hit points and is dying.

In the third round, she suffocates.

contextNotes.text: You can hold your breath for twice as long ([[4*@abilities.con.total]] rounds)
+[[2]] Trait bonus against the effects of inhaled poisons.

freedom fighter (halfling).name: Freedom Fighter (Halfling)
freedom fighter (halfling).description:
Your parents allowed escaping slaves to hide in your home, and the stories you've heard from them instilled into you a deep loathing of slavery.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on any skill check or attack roll made during the process of escaping capture or in helping a slave escape bondage, and Escape Artist is always a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  on any skill check  made during the process of escaping capture or in helping a slave escape bondage.
+[[1]] Trait bonus  on any  attack roll made during the process of escaping capture or in helping a slave escape bondage.

reckless luck (chaldira zuzaristan).name: Reckless Luck (Chaldira Zuzaristan)
reckless luck (chaldira zuzaristan).description:
Like your deity, you charge in when others fall back.

Requirements: Chaldira Zuzaristan

Benefits: When you make a charge attack in the surprise round or first round of combat, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your AC for 1 round.

contextNotes.text: When you make a charge attack in the surprise round or first round of combat, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your AC for 1 round.
When you make a charge attack in the surprise round or first round of combat, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your AC for 1 round.
When you make a charge attack in the surprise round or first round of combat, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your AC for 1 round.

ozem-inspired.name: Ozem-Inspired
ozem-inspired.description:
Tales of the Knights of Ozem have inspired you since childhood to lash out reflexively against the undead.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls when making attacks of opportunity against undead.

While you wield a shield, your shield bonus to AC improves by 1 against attacks of opportunity made by undead.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls when making attacks of opportunity against undead.
While you wield a shield, your shield bonus to AC improves by 1 against attacks of opportunity made by undead.

helpless.name: Helpless
helpless.description:
You once stood helpless as great harm befell a loved one, and that paralysis sometimes returns when an ally is in a dire position.

Effects: The first time per combat encounter that an ally within 30 feet falls unconscious or dies as the result of an attack, you are dazed until the end of your next turn.

stream nomad (darklands).name: Stream Nomad (Darklands)
stream nomad (darklands).description:
Digging tunnels near a body of rushing water has taught you how to use water as a means of travel and escape. Others whisper that you must have been born with webbed feet.

Requirements: Darklands, usually under rivers

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Swim checks, and Swim is always a class skill for you. You increase the speed of any raft, barge, keelboat, or rowboat you pilot by 4 miles per day (1/2 mile per hour).

Usage: Update the Skills tab of your Actor to add the Profession (sailor) skill.

Update the target of the context note on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

contextNotes.text: You increase the speed of any raft, barge, keelboat, or rowboat you pilot by 4 miles per day (1/2 mile per hour).

against the technic league (iron gods).name: Against the Technic League (Iron Gods)
against the technic league (iron gods).description:
Although the Black Sovereign rules Numeria in name, it’s the spellcasters of the Technic League who hold the real power. While their inf luence is certainly strongest in the capital of Starfall, their touch can be felt even here in Torch—the League takes a significant cut of the town’s income as tithes every month. For some reason, you have a grudge against the Technic League. Perhaps your parents lost their jobs as the result of an act they took that displeased the League—you might even suspect the League was responsible for their deaths. Alternatively, you could just rankle at the League’s open acceptance of slavery, their reputation for sadism and cruelty, or their penchant for hoarding and controlling technological wonders. Talk to your GM to refine the reasons why you hate the Technic League, but you’re convinced that they are somehow responsible for putting out the town’s torch and that evidence of their tampering can be found in the caverns below—if you can find evidence of the Technic League working against Torch’s better interests, that could well be a step toward the town’s independence from the League.

Benefits: Choose either weapons or spells. If you choose weapons, you gain a +2 trait bonus on all damage rolls made against targets you know are associated with the Technic League. If you choose spells, increase the save DC of your spells by 1 when you target such a foe.

Usage

  1. Select weapons or spells when you take this trait.

  2. If you choose weapons, update the Target of the Weapons Context note to Attack>Attack Rolls, then Delete the other context note

  3. If you choose spells, update the Target of the Spells Context note to Spells>Spell Effect, then Delete the other context note

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on all damage rolls made against targets you know are associated with the Technic League. (Weapons)
+[[1]] to the save DC of your spells against targets you know are associated with the Technic League. (Spells)

mother's rage (lamashtu).name: Mother's Rage (Lamashtu)
mother's rage (lamashtu).description:
The blood of the beast runs thick in your veins, and your appearance is bestial.

Requirements: Lamashtu

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks, and you treat your caster level as +1 higher when summoning creatures.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] when summoning creatures.

power of suggestion.name: Power of Suggestion
power of suggestion.description:
People trust your words over their own eyes.

Benefits: You may make a Bluff check to make observers believe that an object in your possession is actually a different object entirely. The DC for the check is 20 for items of a similar size, shape, and color (such as a glaive and a quarterstaff). Items of a different shape, size, or color raise the DC by 5 for each dissimilar aspect, or more if the dissimilarity is extreme. This deception lasts 1 minute; if the item is still in view, the observers may recognize their error unless you make another bluff check.

contextNotes.text: Make observers believe that an object in your possession is actually a different object entirely. The DC for the check is 20 for items of a similar size, shape, and color (such as a glaive and a quarterstaff). Items of a different shape, size, or color raise the DC by 5 for each dissimilar aspect, or more if the dissimilarity is extreme. This deception lasts 1 minute; if the item is still in view, the observers may recognize their error unless you make another bluff check.

ancestral armor.name: Ancestral Armor
ancestral armor.description:
You inherited an ancient set of Tar Taargadth armor.

Benefits: You begin play with a set of masterwork armor of your choice. You must be proficient in wearing this armor, and the armor’s total cost cannot exceed 300 gp.

savage.name: Savage
savage.description:
You were born and raised in untamed lands far from civilization. You learned to survive in the elements among brutal humanoids and beasts.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) checks and a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks to get along in the wild. Knowledge (nature) is always a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to get along in the wild.

mark of slavery.name: Mark of Slavery
mark of slavery.description:
You were enslaved for part or all of your youth, and marked as such with a brand or tattoo that still reminds you of how you were punished whenever you failed to do what you should.

Effects: Whenever you fail a skill check, you take a –2 penalty on any skill check or attack roll you attempt before the end of your next turn unless it is a part of retrying the failed skill check.

contextNotes.text: Whenever you fail a skill check, you take a -[[2]] penalty on any skill check or attack roll you attempt before the end of your next turn unless it is a part of retrying the failed skill check.
Whenever you fail a skill check, you take a -[[2]] penalty on any skill check or attack roll you attempt before the end of your next turn unless it is a part of retrying the failed skill check.

empathic diplomat (qadira, osirion).name: Empathic Diplomat (Qadira, Osirion)
empathic diplomat (qadira, osirion).description:
You have long followed the path of common sense and empathic insight when using diplomacy.

Requirements: Qadira or Osirion

Benefits: You modify your Diplomacy checks using your Wisdom modifier, not your Charisma modifier.

Usage

Update the Skills tab of your Actor to amend the ability associated with the Diplomacy skill to reflect Wisdom not Charisma.

knowledgeable caster.name: Knowledgeable Caster
knowledgeable caster.description:
Benefits: Once per day when you cast a divination spell, you can cast that spell as if your caster level were 1 level higher in the appropriate class. You also gain a +1 trait bonus on any Knowledge checks associated with your sorcerer bloodline, if any.

Usage: If your sorcerer bloodline provides a class skill, add a change in the trait's changes tab with a formula of "1", choose "specific skill" in the target option, and choose the knowledge your sorcerer bloodline grants.

secret knowledge (norgorber).name: Secret Knowledge (Norgorber)
secret knowledge (norgorber).description:
Requirements: Norgorber

Benefits: At any point after taking this trait, you may choose one Knowledge skill. You gain a permanent +2 trait bonus on checks with that skill, and it is a class skill for you. Once this skill is chosen, it cannot be changed.

Usage: Select any one (1) Knowledge skill after you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

kobold's neighbor (andoran).name: Kobold's Neighbor (Andoran)
kobold's neighbor (andoran).description:
You grew up in wilderness where kobolds make their homes. You learned early on how to find traps before they find you, how to disable them, and when you should just walk away.

Requirements: Andoran

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus to Perception checks to discover traps and a +1 trait bonus to Disable Device checks.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to discover traps.

defensive strategist (torag).name: Defensive Strategist (Torag)
defensive strategist (torag).description:
Your knowledge of dwarven history and religion gives you an excellent mind for defensive strategy and tactics.

Requirements: Torag

Benefits: You are not flat-footed when you are an unaware combatant. This includes a surprise round that you don't get to act in, and before you get to act at the start of a battle.

contextNotes.text: Not flat-footed when surprised or unaware.

inspiring leader (apsu).name: Inspiring Leader (Apsu)
inspiring leader (apsu).description:
Imitating the leadership of your deity, you spur others on to great deeds.

Requirements: Apsu

Benefits: When you cast a spell that grants allies a morale bonus, you cast that spell at +1 caster level.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] caster level to your spells that grant allies a morale bonus.

diabolist raised (council of thieves).name: Diabolist Raised (Council of Thieves)
diabolist raised (council of thieves).description:
All your life you've lived within the grip of devil-possessed Cheliax. You care little for the religion of your country, but that is the way of life in the most magnificent empire in the world, and who are you to question the faith of the empire's rulers? Certainly not a fool like some of your more idealistic acquaintances, possessed of bizarre ideals about personal freedoms and egalitarian rulership,who can say whatever happened to them? You know of Hell and the rigidity of its grim rulers, you've seen devils and how they might be employed to the betterment of those with the might to control them, and you know of the dark faith of your country. You might not be a devil worshiper yourself, but there are realities to living in Cheliax, and it's always good to know what's really going on behind the scenes.

Benefits: Your knowledge of diabolism grants you a +1 bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, Intimidate, and Sense Motive checks made against Westcrown's nobility, and a +1 bonus on all saving throws made against mindaffecting attacks from devils.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against Westcrown's nobility.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against Westcrown's nobility.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against Westcrown's nobility.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against Westcrown's nobility.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting attacks from devils.

dormant defense.name: Dormant Defense
dormant defense.description:
Your body never lets down its defenses, even when you rest.

Benefits: The DC for Perception checks you attempt while asleep increases only by 7 (instead of the normal +10 increase).

While you are dazed, stunned, or helpless, each critical hit or sneak attack scored against you has a 25% chance of being negated; when a critical hit or sneak attack is negated, roll its damage normally. This doesn’t stack with the fortification armor special ability and similar effects.

contextNotes.text: The DC for checks you attempt while asleep increases only by 7 (instead of the normal +10).

While you are dazed, stunned, or helpless, each critical hit or sneak attack scored against you has a 25% chance of being negated; when a critical hit or sneak attack is negated, roll its damage normally. This doesn’t stack with the fortification armor special ability and similar effects.

nomadic (human; bas'o).name: Nomadic (Human; Bas'o)
nomadic (human; bas'o).description:
You have lived among the Bas'o and know Sargava well.

Requirements: Bas'o Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) and Survival checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you.

Usage: Select Knowledge (geography) or Survival when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

gifted satirist (hell's rebels).name: Gifted Satirist (Hell's Rebels)
gifted satirist (hell's rebels).description:
You grew up among Kintargo’s performers and entertainers. Perhaps your parents or older siblings were singers at the Kintargo Opera House, or maybe you simply had to make ends meet as an orphan of the streets by busking. Whatever the case, you’ve long been exposed to the practice of cloaking scathing political commentaries in the form of harmless entertainment. Whether you conceal your satire in the form of novels, plays, screeds, or public letters, you’ve yet to make a name for yourself as a political presence in Kintargo—but in time, you hope to change that!

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, and Linguistics is always a class skill for you. In addition, your irreverent attitude grants you a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against fear effects.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against fear effects.

earthsense (oread).name: Earthsense (Oread)
earthsense (oread).description:
You were inexplicably transformed in the womb by elemental forces, making your connection to the earth exceptionally strong.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: As a swift action, you can gain @UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-buffs.Item.WVs1d1l2G45GRlQc]{tremorsense }to a range of 60 feet until the beginning of your next turn. You can use this ability once per day at 1st level, plus one additional time per day at 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, to a maximum of five times per day at 20th level.

darkest before dawn.name: Darkest Before Dawn
darkest before dawn.description:
Your devotion sustains you when others would fall to despair.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells with the emotion, fear, or pain descriptor. Once per day, you can increase this bonus to +4 for a single save, but you must make this decision before you attempt the saving throw.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against spells with the emotion, fear, or pain descriptor. Once per day, you can increase this bonus to +[[4]] for a single save, but you must make this decision before you attempt the saving throw.

friend to animals (human).name: Friend to Animals (Human)
friend to animals (human).description:
You grew up in close proximity to animals and relate with them intuitively.

Requirements: Human

Benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on Handle Animal and Ride checks, and one of those skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you. 

Usage: Select Handle Animal or Ride when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

rivalry.name: Rivalry
rivalry.description: Benefits: If you see a family member with this trait within 60 feet of you fail a combat maneuver check or a skill check, you gain a +1 trait bonus on checks to perform the same combat maneuver or use the same skill for 1 round.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus for 1 round, to perform the same skill check, if you see a family member with this trait within 60 feet of you fail a skill check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus for 1 round, to perform the same combat maneuver, if you see a family member with this trait within 60 feet of you fail a combat maneuver check.

town gossip (varisia).name: Town Gossip (Varisia)
town gossip (varisia).description:
Requirements: Varisia

Benefits: Choose a community that you’ve lived in for at least 5 years. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks while in that community.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks while in your chosen community. (one community, you must have lived there for 5 years)

adventurous explorer (halfling; song'o).name: Adventurous Explorer (Halfling; Song'o)
adventurous explorer (halfling; song'o).description:
You are one of the few Song'o halflings to brave the world outside the Laughing Jungle.

Requirements: Song'o (Halfling heritage)

Benefits: When frightened or shaken, you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2.

contextNotes.text: When frightened or shaken, you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2.
When frightened or shaken, you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2.
When frightened or shaken, you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2.
When frightened or shaken, you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2.

roll with it (giantslayer).name: Roll With It (Giantslayer)
roll with it (giantslayer).description:
You’ve trained with some of the best giantslayers out there, and have learned how to avoid the worst effects of a giant’s powerful attacks.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Reflex saves. In addition, once per day, when a creature with the giant subtype successfully confirms a critical hit against you with a weapon or a slam attack (not a spell or special ability), you can roll with the attack. You take normal damage from the blow, as if the critical had not been confirmed. You must be aware of the attack and able to react to it—if you are denied your Dexterity bonus to AC, you can’t use this ability. If you are a dwarf or a gnome, you can use this ability twice per day.

Usage: If you are a dwarf or a gnome, update this trait : On the Details tab> Actions Section> edit the "Limited Uses" from 1 to 2

armun kelisk scholar (plane of air).name: Armun Kelisk Scholar (Plane of Air)
armun kelisk scholar (plane of air).description:
During your time on the Plane of Air, you visited the libraries of Armun Kelisk frequently and voraciously read the tomes therein.

Requirements: Plane of Air

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (planes) checks and checks made with one other Knowledge skill of your choice. This bonus increases to +3 when used to identify a creature with the air subtype. Knowledge (planes) becomes a class skill for you, and your bonus language options at 1st level include Auran. This choice is in addition to the bonus languages available to the character because of her race.

Usage

Select one Knowledge skill (other than Knowledge (planes) ) when you take this trait.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the note on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus when used to identify a creature with the air subtype.  This trait already provides a constant +1 Trait bonus.
+[[3]] Trait bonus when used to identify a creature with the air subtype.  This trait already provides a constant +1 Trait bonus.

talented organizer (milani).name: Talented Organizer (Milani)
talented organizer (milani).description:
You are both knowledgeable and skilled when it comes to putting together resistance organizations, thanks to your keen sense of what motivates people.

Requirements: Milani

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive skill checks, and Sense Motive is always a class skill for you.

unflinching faith (nidal).name: Unflinching Faith (Nidal)
unflinching faith (nidal).description:
Numerous expeditions to accursed regions like Nidal’s Finder's Gulch have reinforced your already steadfast faith.

Requirements: Nidal

Benefits: Once per day, you may reroll a Will saving throw made against an attack or effect that originates from an undead creature. You must decide to use this trait after the first saving throw is rolled, but before the results are revealed. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is lower.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you may reroll a Will saving throw made against an attack or effect that originates from an undead creature. You must decide to use this trait after the first saving throw is rolled, but before the results are revealed. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is lower.

servitor of spirits (tian xia).name: Servitor of Spirits (Tian Xia)
servitor of spirits (tian xia).description:
For as long as you can remember, the spirits have always whispered into your ears and guided you—provided that you appease them.

Requirements: Must hail from Tian Xia or have lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: At the start of each day, you can choose one medium spirit (Pathfinder RPG Occult Adventures 33–36) and accept one of its taboos for 24 hours. As long as you don’t break that taboo, once during the next 24 hours, you can add a +1 trait bonus to any one roll, check, or saving throw (but not to AC) listed under your chosen spirit’s spirit bonus. Using this ability is a free action that you can use even if it isn’t your turn. If you are a medium, the spirit you choose with this trait must be the same as the spirit you are channeling and vice versa.

airship captain (plane of air).name: Airship Captain (Plane of Air)
airship captain (plane of air).description:
Your years of piloting airships on the Plane of Air, dodging angry mephits and protecting your passengers from the depredations of capricious elementals, have taught you how to expertly command your vessel, as well as how to arrest yourself even in the midst of the most turbulent planar storms.

Requirements: Plane of Air

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Wisdom checks to move in a plane with subjective directional gravity (see the planar rules in the Pathfinder RPG GameMastery Guide) and a +2 trait bonus on driving checks (see the vehicle rules in Pathfinder RPG Ultimate Combat).

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to move in a plane with subjective directional gravity, and on  driving checks.

marked by nature's magic (skinwalker).name: Marked by Nature's Magic (Skinwalker)
marked by nature's magic (skinwalker).description:
You hail from a community—perhaps in Arcadia or the Lands of the Linnorm Kings—that encouraged you to interact with fey.

Requirements: Skinwalker

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) checks involving fey and on Diplomacy checks to influence fey. Knowledge (nature) is always a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  to influence fey.
+[[1]] Trait bonus  on  checks involving fey.

younger sibling (jade regent).name: Younger Sibling (Jade Regent)
younger sibling (jade regent).description:
You've lived your whole life in the shadow of your older sibling, a person who seems to have the adventure-filled lifestyle you've always wanted for yourself. While your sibling always took care of you, he or she never supported your desire to become an adventurer,your sibling never explained why, only saying, "Adventuring can cause a lot of pain just as easily as it can bring success and riches." As a younger sibling to one of Sandpoint's more influential citizens, you share some of that NPC's innate talent and skill at adventuring.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten your older sibling as well as one of the following:

If you're Ameiko's younger sibling, your ferocious independence and self-confidence give you a +1 trait bonus on Will saving throws.

If you're Sandru's younger sibling, your hearty constitution gives you a +1 trait bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.

If you're Shalelu's younger sibling, your quick reflexes give you a +1 trait bonus on all Reflex saving throws.

Notes

Although you're a younger sibling of an established NPC, this doesn't necessarily lock you in to being the same race as that NPC - if you're a different race or ethnicity than the NPC you choose as your older sister or brother, you were adopted into the family by your parents.

NPC Choices: Ameiko, Sandru, Shalelu.

Usage:

  1. Select Ameiko (Will), Sandru (Fortitude) or Shalelu (Reflex) when you take this trait.

  2. Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice. (Will, Fortitude, or Reflex)

  3. Update the text of the context note on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice. (Ameiko, Sandru, or Shalelu)

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on all attack rolls against foes that threaten your older sibling, (Ameiko, Sandru, or Shalelu).

stowaway (serpent's skull).name: Stowaway (Serpent's Skull)
stowaway (serpent's skull).description:
Not all passengers on seafaring vessels are legal or even known to the captain and crew, and the Jenivere is no exception. Whether too poor to book legal passage on the ship or fearing discovery by customs officials in your home port, you or an ally stowed away on the ship in secret. This may mean that the crew doesn't know you're on board, or perhaps they do now but didn't when the ship set sail.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks and Survival checks to find food.

Characters with this trait might have boarded the Jenivere at any port, but especially in the cities of the Shackles.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks to find food.

market rat (human; keleshite).name: Market Rat (Human; Keleshite)
market rat (human; keleshite).description:
You spent your youth amid the varied market stalls and mercantile leagues across Golarion. Perhaps you came from a family of merchants, or you dwelt amid the many booths of a market, begging to survive.

Requirements: Kelshite Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise and Knowledge (local) checks.

the patriarch.name: The Patriarch
the patriarch.description:
Like the father of the Cosmic Caravan, you have an innate sense of direction.

Requirements: 21 Sarenith - 20 Erastus

Benefits: Three times per day, you can use @UUID[Compendium.pf1.spells.Item.yssjgukwe3dgjhf3]{Know Direction} as a spell-like ability, treating your character level as your caster level.

unwelcome business.name: Unwelcome Business
unwelcome business.description:
You specialize in delivering or procuring shipments where those commodities are not allowed or where your identity would elicit negative bias.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Disguise or Sleight of Hand checks, and that skill becomes a class skill for you. In addition, choose one humanoid species; you ignore the –2 penalty on Disguise checks to disguise yourself as a member of that species.

Usage: Choose Disguise or Sleight of Hand when this trait is taken and add that skill on the Details and Changes tab.

Choose a Humanoid species and update Disguise note to reflect that choice.

contextNotes.text: Ignore the -2 penalty to disguise yourself as <chosen humanoid species>.

regional influence - magnimar (varisia).name: Regional Influence - Magnimar (Varisia)
regional influence - magnimar (varisia).description:
Although you live some distance from the city-state your community owes fealty to, you’ve been influenced by its sophisticated urban ways.

Requirements: Varisia

Benefits: Determine the city-state of which your home is a holding. You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with one Profession skill and one of the following benefits.

Magnimar

Gain one random @UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-items.Item.IbSjz0hXs2E7TwoN]{Varisian Idol} (see page 15 of Varisia, Birthplace of Legends).

Usage: Select one Profession skill when you take this trait.

Update the Skills tab of your Actor to add the chosen skill.

Update the target of the untargeted change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Special Note

This is one of three versions of this trait. Other versions can be found here:

@UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-traits.Item.im0JBzMqeObourHw]{Regional Influence - Riddleport (Varisia)}

@UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-traits.Item.UNEA8OGKTfw7UdSb]{Regional Influence - Korvosa (Varisia)}

student of nantambu (human; mwangi).name: Student of Nantambu (Human; Mwangi)
student of nantambu (human; mwangi).description:
You have spent time at Magaambya, the magical academy of Nantambu, absorbing the ancient knowledge taught there.

Requirements: Mwangi Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Spellcraft checks, and you may make these checks untrained.

contextNotes.text: You may make these checks untrained.
You may make these checks untrained.

gallant imposter (mendevian crusader).name: Gallant Imposter (Mendevian Crusader)
gallant imposter (mendevian crusader).description:
Requirements: Mendevian Crusader

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) and Knowledge (religion) checks. In addition, you gain a +2 trait bonus on both Disguise and Bluff checks while attempting to impersonate a knight.

contextNotes.text:
+[[2]] Trait bonus 
 while attempting to impersonate a knight.

+[[2]] Trait bonus 
 while attempting to impersonate a knight.

spell duel prodigy (erages).name: Spell Duel Prodigy (Erages)
spell duel prodigy (erages).description:
You’ve participated in many spell duels during your time at Erages Academy, and you’ve developed a keen talent for identifying magical arts.

Requirements: Erages

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks to identify a spell as it is being cast and on dispel checks to counterspell a spell.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify a spell as it is being cast.

resilient construction (wyrwood).name: Resilient Construction (Wyrwood)
resilient construction (wyrwood).description:
You spent a great deal of time around magical workshops, and the power of magic sustains you.

Requirements: Wyrwood

Benefits: Once per day, if you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points while under the effects of an ongoing spell you cast with a range of personal, you are not destroyed by the attack, but instead become inactive and helpless for 1 round, at negative hit points. If you take damage again during that time, or if you are still below 0 hit points at the end of that round, you are destroyed.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, if you would be reduced to 0 or fewer hit points while under the effects of an ongoing spell you cast with a range of personal, you are not destroyed by the attack, but instead become inactive and helpless for 1 round, at negative hit points. If you take damage again during that time, or if you are still below 0 hit points at the end of that round, you are destroyed.

friend of the fey (lands of the linnorm.name: Friend of the Fey (Lands of the Linnorm Kings)
friend of the fey (lands of the linnorm.description:
You have a special relationship with the fey, having grown up in close proximity to them.

Requirements: Lands of the Linnorm Kings

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks against fey creatures.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against fey creatures.

unflappable arrogance (ifrit).name: Unflappable Arrogance (Ifrit)
unflappable arrogance (ifrit).description:
You laugh in the face of your aggressors.

Requirements: Ifrit

Benefits: The DC to demoralize you with the Intimidate skill increases by 5. If an opponent’s Intimidate check would be high enough to cause you to become demoralized for more than 1 round, you are instead demoralized for only 1 round.

blade of the society (rogue, pathfinder.name: Blade of the Society (Rogue, Pathfinder Society)
blade of the society (rogue, pathfinder.description:
The Society gave you access to charts detailing the weak spots of hundreds of humanoids and monsters.

Requirements: Rogue, Pathfinder Society

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to damage rolls from sneak attacks.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to damage rolls from sneak attacks

redeemed by ragathiel (ragathiel).name: Redeemed by Ragathiel (Ragathiel)
redeemed by ragathiel (ragathiel).description:
You were born into a family, nation, or other group that tried to impress evil ideals upon you, but you were inspired by Ragathiel to live a moral life despite their influence.

Requirements: Ragathiel

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks to see through an evil creature’s Bluff attempts.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to see through an evil creature’s Bluff attempts.

family ties (rise of the runelords).name: Family Ties (Rise of the Runelords)
family ties (rise of the runelords).description:
While not ethnically a Varisian, you have been raised among Varisians and they consider you one of their own. Furthermore, you managed to get in good with a group of Sczarni and consider them your new family. After being run out of the last place your Sczarni family camped, you tracked down a friend of the family in Sandpoint—a ruthless thug named Jubrayl Vhiski at the Fatman’s Feedbag.

Benefits: During your time with the Sczarni, you learned a few tricks of the trade. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (local) checks and Knowledge (local) is always a class skill for you. In addition, you begin play able to speak and read Varisian.

unbreakable hate (half-orc, orc).name: Unbreakable Hate (Half-Orc, Orc)
unbreakable hate (half-orc, orc).description:
Your ferocity is focused into your spells, and it is harder to break your concentration.

Requirements: Half-Orc, Orc

Benefits: You receive a +2 trait bonus on all concentration checks.

sandpoint faithful (rise of the runelord.name: Sandpoint Faithful (Rise of the Runelords)
sandpoint faithful (rise of the runelord.description:
As a faithful adherent of Abadar, Desna, Erastil, Gozreh, Sarenrae, or Shelyn, you’ve come to the Swallowtail Festival to celebrate the consecration of Sandpoint Cathedral.

Benefits: You gain a silver holy symbol of your chosen deity, and so long as you worship that deity and openly wear his or her symbol, you regain +1 additional hit point every time you receive magical healing.

eldritch delver.name: Eldritch Delver
eldritch delver.description:
You have an unquenchable thirst for knowledge about the world and desire to obtain it firsthand.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Knowledge (dungeoneering) and Knowledge (history) checks, and you may treat your caster level as 1 level higher for all conjuration spells of the teleportation subschool.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] to CL for all conjuration spells of the teleportation subschool.

bladed magic.name: Bladed Magic
bladed magic.description:
You have an innate talent for using magical weaponry and those weapons capable of becoming magical.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Craft checks made to craft magic or masterwork weapons. In addition, when you use your arcane pool class ability to grant a weapon an enhancement bonus, that bonus lasts for 2 minutes instead of 1.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on Craft checks made to craft magic or masterwork weapons.
Weapon enhancement bonuses gained by using your arcane pool last for 2 minutes.

second tongue (old cults).name: Second Tongue (Old Cults)
second tongue (old cults).description:
Using an ancient and painful surgical technique, you've reshaped your tongue. These surgical mutilations permit you to speak ancient words unpronounceable to most mortals, enhancing your ability to work magic associated with the Great Old Ones.

Requirements: Old Cults

Benefits: Any summoning or divination spell you cast to summon or contact a Great Old One or one of their minions is cast at +1 caster level.

contextNotes.text: Any summoning or divination spell you cast to summon or contact a Great Old One or one of their minions is cast at +1 caster level.

firebug (kobold).name: Firebug (Kobold)
firebug (kobold).description:
Like the red dragons that inspire your tribe, you’re blessed with a small spark of incendiary magic.

Requirements: Kobold

Benefits: You are able to cast spark three times per day as a spell-like ability. The caster level is equal to your character level. This spell-like ability’s save DC is Intelligence-based.

keeper of the ancestral scrolls (human;.name: Keeper of the Ancestral Scrolls (Human; Tian)
keeper of the ancestral scrolls (human;.description:
You take pride in recording the genealogy of your family, tracing your heritage on large scrolls dating back hundreds, if not thousands of years.

Requirements: Tian Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (history), and Knowledge (nobility) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you.

Usage: Select Knowledge (history) or Knowledge (nobility) when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

prestigious healer (cheliax).name: Prestigious Healer (Cheliax)
prestigious healer (cheliax).description:
Requirements: Cheliax

Benefits: Once per day as an immediate action when you cast a spell of the healing subschool, you can attempt a Diplomacy check to improve the attitude of your target or anyone within 30 feet who can see you before the end of your next turn. You gain a +2 trait bonus on this check.

neutralizing gut (tiefling).name: Neutralizing Gut (Tiefling)
neutralizing gut (tiefling).description:
Your fiendish heritage has made you more resilient to the many poisonous threats in wastelands.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against contact and inhaled poisons, and a +3 trait bonus on saving throws against ingested poisons.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against contact and inhaled poisons and a +[[3]] Trait bonus  against ingested poisons.

pride.name: Pride
pride.description:
You can’t abide challenges to your dignity, authority, or honor.

Effects: When someone threatens, accuses, or challenges you, you take a –2 penalty on Diplomacy checks and Sense Motive checks involving that creature until the creature apologizes to you.

contextNotes.text: -[[2]] penalty with someone who has  threatened, accused, or challenged you but not apologized.
-[[2]] penalty with someone who has  threatened, accused, or challenged you but not apologized.

reckless contempt.name: Reckless Contempt
reckless contempt.description:
You do not fear the threat of lesser weapons.

Benefits: Whenever you provoke an attack of opportunity by firing a firearm, you gain a +1 trait bonus on the attack roll that provoked the attack of opportunity.

contextNotes.text: Whenever you provoke an attack of opportunity by firing a firearm, you gain a +[[1]] Trait bonus on the attack roll that provoked the attack of opportunity.

gozreh's sight (gozreh).name: Gozreh's Sight (Gozreh)
gozreh's sight (gozreh).description:
Your faith in the Wind and the Waves helps you navigate through all manner of mist or haze.

Requirements: Gozreh

Benefits: You can see normally up to 5 feet away in areas of non-magical fog, mist, rain, or similar conditions (such as the spray of a waterfall).

Your sight is still obscured beyond 5 feet as normal in these conditions.

tactile telekinesis (lashunta).name: Tactile Telekinesis (Lashunta)
tactile telekinesis (lashunta).description:
Requirements: Lashunta

Benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can add a trait bonus equal to your Intelligence modifier on Strength checks and Strength-based skill checks you attempt before the beginning of your next turn.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, as a swift action, +[[@abilities.int.mod]]  on Strength checks and Strength-based skill checks you attempt before the beginning of your next turn.
Once per day, as a swift action, +[[@abilities.int.mod]]  on Strength checks and Strength-based skill checks you attempt before the beginning of your next turn.

family trade.name: Family Trade
family trade.description:
Benefits: Choose one skill. All family members with this trait must choose the same skill and it is always a class skill for you. When you are within 60 feet of a family member with this trait, you gain a +2 trait bonus on checks with this skill.

Usage: Choose which skill is a class skill and mark it in the Details tab. Set Target of the Context Note to the chosen skill in Changes tab.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when you are within 60 feet of a family member with this trait

unscathed.name: Unscathed
unscathed.description:
You are amazingly resistant to energy attacks because of either your upbringing or magical experimentation.

Benefits: Each type of energy resistance you have (if any) increases by 2 points.

frontier healer (ironfang invasion).name: Frontier Healer (Ironfang Invasion)
frontier healer (ironfang invasion).description:
You make your way in life by putting people back together after the rigors of the world take their toll—brewing herbal remedies, setting broken bones, and treating diseases.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Heal and Knowledge (nature) checks, and one of these skills is always a class skill for you. Any time you restore hit points using the Heal skill or a cure spell (but not with channeled energy, lay on hands, or a magic device such as a potion or wand), you restore 1 additional hit point, plus 1 for every 2 class levels you have beyond 1st.

Usage: Select Heal or Knowledge (nature) when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

contextNotes.text: Any time you restore hit points using the Heal skill, (but not with channeled energy, lay on hands, or a magic device such as a potion or wand), you restore additional hit points equal to ([[1 + floor((@attributes.hd.total -1) /2)]])

Any time you restore hit points using a cure spell, (but not with channeled energy, lay on hands, or a magic device such as a potion or wand), you restore additional hit points equal to ([[1 + floor((@attributes.hd.total -1) /2)]])

dinosaur whisperer (ilizmagorti).name: Dinosaur Whisperer (Ilizmagorti)
dinosaur whisperer (ilizmagorti).description:
After spending a month in the Mediogaltian jungle, you developed a knack for dealing with dinosaurs.

Requirements: Ilizmagorti

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) and Survival checks concerning dinosaurs. You also gain a +1 trait bonus on wild empathy checks made to affect dinosaurs.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  on  checks concerning dinosaurs.
+[[1]] Trait bonus  on  checks concerning dinosaurs.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on wild empathy checks made to affect dinosaurs.

open palm of irori (human; vudrani).name: Open Palm of Irori (Human; Vudrani)
open palm of irori (human; vudrani).description:
Your practice of the tenets of Vudrani martial arts has granted you a perfect balance between body and spirit.

Requirements: Vudrani Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics and Knowledge (religion) checks. If you have a ki pool, once per day as a swift action, you may channel your ki during an unarmed strike, gaining a +2 trait bonus on one damage roll. This additional damage is precision damage.

dualborn (suli).name: Dualborn (Suli)
dualborn (suli).description:
You were not born of a janni—your non-human heritage can instead be traced back to some dualistic power between elemental realms.

Requirements: Suli

Benefits: Choose two energy types other than sonic (acid, cold, electricity, or fire). Once made, this choice cannot be changed. You gain racial energy resistance only to the energy types you choose, and not to others. When using your elemental assault ability, you can only sheath your arms in the energy types selected, but you can choose to sheath your primary hand with one of the selected energy types and your off-hand with the other. Attacks made with each hand (or a weapon held in each hand) deal bonus energy damage of the selected type. While wielding a two-handed weapon, half of the bonus energy damage is one energy type and half is the other.

giant slayer (rise of the runelords).name: Giant Slayer (Rise of the Runelords)
giant slayer (rise of the runelords).description:
Your family’s village was plundered by giants in the wilds of Varisia, leaving nothing but a smoldering ruin. After the destruction of your village, your family trained for combat against giants to prevent such a tragedy from ever happening again. Since hearing of giants mobilizing throughout the countryside, you ventured to Sandpoint to help the town prepare for a possible incursion.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Perception, and Sense Motive checks and +1 trait bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls against creatures of the giant subtype.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls against creatures of the giant subtype.

following breeze (sylph).name: Following Breeze (Sylph)
following breeze (sylph).description:
You always seem to be chased by drafts of moving air, and know exactly the right moment and method to lift yourself upon the breezes.

Requirements: Sylph

Benefits: As long as you get a running start, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Acrobatics checks made to jump. Your speed increases by 5 feet when you use the run action.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on  checks made to jump - as long as you get a running start.

lost nobility.name: Lost Nobility
lost nobility.description:
Your family was prominent before the rise of Thrune, but that legacy is now forgotten by all but you. You hold every Chelish government official (including Hellknights) personally responsible for your lost glory.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack and damage rolls against these officials.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack and damage rolls against Chelish government officials (including Hellknights).

successful shirker (halfling).name: Successful Shirker (Halfling)
successful shirker (halfling).description:
Born and raised a slave with no hope of advancement, you are adept at avoiding your overseer's ire and attention, the better to spend time on your own interests.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks and a +3 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy checks to avoid punishment by lawful authority.

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus to avoid punishment by lawful authority.
+[[3]] Trait bonus to avoid punishment by lawful authority.

weapon training (human; ulfen).name: Weapon Training (Human; Ulfen)
weapon training (human; ulfen).description:
As soon as you were old enough to hold it, you were trained to defend yourself with traditional Ulfen weapons.

Requirements: Ulfen Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls with the following weapons: @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.KtgSPHGqIRTwhwZM]{Bastard Sword}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.JIljkqPWhmvAPYbI]{Battle Axe}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.Wx22UaMqWgCrYi7r]{greataxe}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.oyUApQSVsAqzyjdz]{greatsword}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.F9GR4mUpehjkNdMj]{handaxe}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.Dwk80eD0rB93lPnN]{Light Hammer}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.PqJih70EG2A1XNGf]{longbow}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.zWRlna42PMJVX6un]{longsword}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.Ata6ajiY9wuAnBLB]{shortbow}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.05rD6YP5sVSrKY28]{Shortsword}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.gAs85NM90mIR4O4Z]{Throwing Axe}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf1.weapons-and-ammo.Item.pCFqtR5WrJmeZnDF]{warhammer}.

Usage

For each of the above weapons your actor wields, modify as follows:

  • Edit the weapon.
  • On the weapon's details tab, edit the attack.
  • On the attack's Action tab, scroll down to the Damage section, in the damage formula, add "+1" to the formula.

imperfect recall.name: Imperfect Recall
imperfect recall.description:
Your belief in reincarnation, as taught by the Sangpotshi philosophy and in lands that were once Imperial Lung Wa, has been reinforced by personal experience. In moments of great stress, you sometimes experience flashes of déjà vu in which you recall information you don’t remember ever having known.

Benefits: Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +3 bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.

contextNotes.text: Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.
Once per day while you are in danger or distracted, you gain a +[[3]] bonus on a single Knowledge skill check.

twisted transformations (any great old o.name: Twisted Transformations (any Great Old One)
twisted transformations (any great old o.description:
Requirements: Any Great Old One
