Benefits: Any transmutation spell you cast upon yourself has its duration increased by 2 rounds. Transmutation spells with an instantaneous duration are not affected by this trait.

contextNotes.text: Any transmutation spell you cast upon yourself has its duration increased by 2 rounds.

clearheaded (dwarf).name: Clearheaded (Dwarf)
clearheaded (dwarf).description:
You see through deception and lies.

Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills, and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against illusion effects.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against illusion effects.

minkai advocate (minkai).name: Minkai Advocate (Minkai)
minkai advocate (minkai).description:
You possess strong ties to Minkai, and spread flattering words regarding your empire.

Requirements: Minkai

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff becomes a class skill for you.

shared ancestors (myr).name: Shared Ancestors (Myr)
shared ancestors (myr).description:
Through your detailed study of your own lineage, you can better understand and honor even your most distant relatives.

Requirements: Myr

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy, Knowledge (history), Knowledge (local), Knowledge (nobility), and Sense Motive checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes. One of these skills becomes a class skill.

Usage: Select one of the skills mentioned above, when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on checks associated with any creature who shares your type and at least one of your subtypes.

lingshen's finest (lingshen).name: Lingshen's Finest (Lingshen)
lingshen's finest (lingshen).description:
You are an elite soldier in one of Lingshen's numerous armies, and your discipline has made you a truly deadly foe.

Requirements: Lingshen

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all rolls to confirm critical hits.

cultivated (any city).name: Cultivated (Any City)
cultivated (any city).description:
You grew up speaking multiple languages.

Requirements: Any City

Benefits: You learn one additional language. Additionally, when attempting a Diplomacy check to gather information using this language, you can do so in 1d6 × 10 minutes, rather than the normal 1d4 hours.

Usage

Select one (1) of one additional language when you take this trait.

Update the Granted Proficiencies>Languages section of the details tab of this trait to reflect this choice.

Update the text of the note on the changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice as well.

contextNotes.text: When attempting a check to gather information using <Chosen Language>, you can do so in 1d6 × 10 minutes, rather than the normal 1d4 hours.

anticipate evil (tiefling).name: Anticipate Evil (Tiefling)
anticipate evil (tiefling).description:
You can read subtle clues in the body language of fiends, allowing you to react just a bit faster than normal when dealing with such beings.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed Dexterity-based skill checks against outsiders with the evil subtype.

In addition, when your initiative is tied with such creatures, you always act first regardless of which of you has a higher initiative modifier.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed Dexterity-based skill checks against outsiders with the evil subtype.
When your initiative is tied with outsiders with the evil subtype, you always act first.

tropical botanist (elf).name: Tropical Botanist (Elf)
tropical botanist (elf).description:
You are familiar with beneficial and dangerous plants.

Requirements: Elf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) checks to locate or identify plants and on saving throws against the extraordinary abilities of plants.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against the extraordinary abilities of plants.
+[[1]] Trait bonus to locate or identify plants.

blooded (mindspin mountains).name: Blooded (Mindspin Mountains)
blooded (mindspin mountains).description:
Desperate battles have honed your fighting skills against the ancient enemies of the dwarves.

Requirements: Mindspin Mountains

Benefits: You receive a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against giants, goblins, and orcs.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  on weapon damage rolls against giants, goblins, and orcs.

religious reformer.name: Religious Reformer
religious reformer.description:
You have spent many years studying the tenets of your faith, and now believe that the dominant factions within the church have deviated from its true meaning and purpose. Rather than breaking with your misguided church, you’ve decided to stand up and fight to reform the organization you love. You have fervently studied scripture and steeled your will to combat the divergent beliefs of your peers

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) checks that pertain to your own religion or spiritual practice, and you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells cast by others who worship your god or adhere to your philosophy.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on checks that pertain to your own religion or spiritual practice.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against spells cast by others who worship your god or adhere to your philosophy.

brimstone seer (orc).name: Brimstone Seer (Orc)
brimstone seer (orc).description:
You were exposed to vision-granting caustic vapors by the oracles of the Brimstone Haruspex, whether because you had a pressing question or because a parent or chieftain considered you an expendable proxy.

Requirements: Orc

Benefits: The vapors left scars that impose a –1 penalty on Charisma-based checks but, once per day, you gain a flash of insight that allows you to roll twice on a Knowledge skill check or Intelligence check and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.
Once per day, roll twice and take the better result. You must choose to use this trait before rolling.

div hunter (thuvia).name: Div Hunter (Thuvia)
div hunter (thuvia).description:
Divs have tormented you and your loved ones for as long as you can remember. You’ve improved your skills to better oppose the creatures.

Requirements: Thuvia

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge checks to identify divs (and their special powers and weaknesses) and a +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against divs.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus  to identify divs.
+[[1]] Trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against divs.

portentous perception (second darkness).name: Portentous Perception (Second Darkness)
portentous perception (second darkness).description:
You’ve come (or been sent) to Riddleport to observe the strange Blot that has appeared in the city’s sky. You’ve decided to put your keen senses to the test at the Golden Goblin’s upcoming gambling competition while you’re here. Your sharp eyesight makes it easier for you to notice things at a distance.

Benefits: For you, Perception checks only start increasing in difficulty at a range of 20 feet or farther, as opposed to the normal 10. This has no effect on checks made to perceive things within 10 feet.

contextNotes.text: For you, checks only start increasing in difficulty at a range of 20 feet or farther, as opposed to the normal 10. This has no effect on checks made to perceive things within 10 feet.

vialesk historian (plane of water).name: Vialesk Historian (Plane of Water)
vialesk historian (plane of water).description:
our long years of studious research into the drifting trade city of Vialesk, a neutral ground for planar travelers on the Elemental Plane of Water, has made you an expert on all manner of aquatic creatures.

Requirements: Plane of Water

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (planes) checks to identify outsiders with the water subtype. In addition, you treat your caster level as 1 higher when casting conjuration (summoning) spells to summon outsiders with the water subtype.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify outsiders with the water subtype.
+[[1]] to caster level when casting conjuration (summoning) spells to summon outsiders with the water subtype.

boarded in the mwangi expanse (serpent's.name: Boarded in the Mwangi Expanse (Serpent's Skull)
boarded in the mwangi expanse (serpent's.description:
You boarded the Jenivere in the Mwangi Expanse, where you've lived or recently traveled through. You harbor no illusions regarding the deadliness of the jungles, the creatures that inhabit it, or the peoples that make their home therein.

Benefits: You gain Polyglot as a bonus language and receive a +1 trait bonus on all Knowledge (nature) checks regarding the jungle.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on checks regarding the jungle.

kami talker (forest of spirits).name: Kami Talker (Forest of Spirits)
kami talker (forest of spirits).description:
You have traversed the Forest of Spirits numerous times, and have learned how best to communicate with its otherworldly inhabitants.

Requirements: Forest of Spirits

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks made against outsiders that have the native subtype.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against native outsiders.
+[[2]] Trait bonus against native outsiders.

undermarket smuggler (goka).name: Undermarket Smuggler (Goka)
undermarket smuggler (goka).description:
You worked in Goka's Undermarket for a time, and have learned how to dodge the city's tax collectors and the port inspectors.

Requirements: Goka

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Sleight of Hand checks.

sandy ambush (oread).name: Sandy Ambush (Oread)
sandy ambush (oread).description:
You are skilled at blending in with the desert terrain and attacking creatures as they pass by.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: When prone in desert terrain, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Stealth checks and take only a –2 penalty on attack rolls (rather than –4) when attacking from prone.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus when prone in desert terrain.
You take only a -[[2]] penalty on attack rolls (rather than -4) when attacking from prone.

sensing imperfection (irori; halfling).name: Sensing Imperfection (Irori; Halfling)
sensing imperfection (irori; halfling).description:
Your belief in Irori has honed your ability to recognize when someone lies or dissembles.

Requirements: Irori; Halfling

Benefits: Sense Motive is a class skill for you, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks.

just like new.name: Just Like New
just like new.description:
Broken firearms are not problems—they are challenges.

Benefits: Your first attempt to remove the broken condition from your starting firearm and to upgrade it to a masterwork weapon costs 150 gp instead of 300 gp.

In addition, when wielding a firearm that has the broken condition or is treated as if it had the broken condition, you take a –1 penalty on attack rolls made with it instead of the normal –2.

contextNotes.text: -[[1]] penalty on attack rolls instead of the normal -2, when wielding a firearm that has, or is treated as if it has, the broken condition.

thrall spotter (dhampir; ancient-born).name: Thrall Spotter (Dhampir; Ancient-Born)
thrall spotter (dhampir; ancient-born).description:
Your heritage gives you an understanding of the powers of domination.

Requirements: Ancient-Born Dhampir Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +5 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks made to determine whether a creature is acting under the effects of a charm or compulsion.

contextNotes.text: +[[5]] Trait bonus to determine whether a creature is acting under the effects of a charm or compulsion.

split-second defense (milani).name: Split-Second Defense (Milani)
split-second defense (milani).description:
Requirements: Milani

Benefits
When you are the target of an attack by an opponent that is flanking you, as an immediate action once per day you can foil that opponent’s attack. For that attack, the opponent does not gain any of the bonuses or effects that are associated with flanking.

contextNotes.text: When you are the target of an attack by an opponent that is flanking you, as an immediate action once per day you can foil that opponent’s attack. For that attack, the opponent does not gain any of the bonuses or effects that are associated with flanking.

cunning liar (any city).name: Cunning Liar (Any City)
cunning liar (any city).description:
You were forced into hiding or willingly went on the run at a young age, and learned to reading others’ interests to inform your lies.

Requirements: Any City

Benefits: You can use your Intelligence or Wisdom modifier in place of your Charisma modifier on Bluff checks.

Usage

Select Intelligence or Wisdom when you take this trait.

Update the Skills tab of your Actor to amend the ability associated with the bluff skill to reflect your choice.

rejected emperor.name: Rejected Emperor
rejected emperor.description:
When you were young, your parents presented you to the oracles of Po Li, claiming a divine sign showed you were the reincarnation of Lung Wa’s Eternal Emperor. The oracles did not support the claim, but you are not untouched by celestial influence.

Benefits: You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders, and nonevil outsiders you encounter begin with an attitude that is one step better than normal.

contextNotes.text: You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
You may use Knowledge (nobility) or Knowledge (religion) in place of Knowledge (planes) to identify outsiders.
Non-evil outsiders you encounter begin with an attitude that is one step better than normal.

self-reliant.name: Self-Reliant
self-reliant.description:
You know how to work with your hands and aren’t dependent on complex tools.

Benefits: When attempting Craft checks, you take no penalty when using improvised tools. At the GM’s discretion, you can attempt certain Craft checks even when no tools are available, though you take a –2 penalty.

contextNotes.text: You take no penalty when using improvised tools. At the GM’s discretion, you can attempt certain Craft checks even when no tools are available, though you take a –2 penalty.

spellcaster's anathema (dwarf).name: Spellcaster's Anathema (Dwarf)
spellcaster's anathema (dwarf).description:
You see arcane magic as untrustworthy and its use as a calamity waiting to happen.

Requirements: Dwarf

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against arcane spellcasters.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attack rolls against arcane spellcasters.

performance artist (taldor faction).name: Performance Artist (Taldor Faction)
performance artist (taldor faction).description:
As a youth, you were involved with the avant garde theater scene of Oppara. Your performance skills have been known to bring even the toughest crowd to their feet.

Requirements: Taldor Faction

Benefits: Choose one type of Perform skill. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perform checks of the chosen type and this skill becomes a class skill for you.

Usage

Select one Perform skill when you take this trait.

Update the Skills tab of your Actor to add the chosen skill.

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

perfect servant (halfling).name: Perfect Servant (Halfling)
perfect servant (halfling).description:
Your training as a maid or valet has left you with unconscious mannerisms that seem to put members of the upper class at ease.

Requirements: Halfling

Benefits: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks made to influence anyone with at least one level of Aristocrat.

contextNotes.text: +[[3]] Trait bonus to influence anyone with at least one level of Aristocrat.

paranoid.name: Paranoid
paranoid.description:
You believe that someone or something is always out to get you, so you have a hard time truly trusting anyone.

Effects: Anyone who attempts an aid another action of any type to assist you must succeed at a DC 15 check instead of the normal DC 10 check.

authoritarian.name: Authoritarian
authoritarian.description:
You spent much of your youth helping the clergy of your chosen faith perform their duties, and learned from them respect for authority.

Benefits: As long as you are acting in the service of a liege or leader you recognize as legitimate, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear and compulsion effects.

Suggested Characters

Abadarans, Hellknights, Hermeans.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against fear and compulsion effects, when serving a leader you think is legitimate.

rest for the wicked.name: Rest for the Wicked
rest for the wicked.description:
Often forced to go without food or stimulation for days at a time, you have learned to use prolonged sleep as a means of escape and a way to heal your wounds.

Benefits: You heal temporary ability damage at a rate of 3 points per day of complete bed rest. A normal night of rest (8 hours) still heals you at a rate of only 1 point of temporary ability damage per night of rest.

jacket training.name: Jacket Training
jacket training.description:
Mercenary League

The bodyguards to Druma’s ruling Kalistocrats, Mercenary League members are more commonly called Blackjackets for the armored coats that are part of their uniforms.

Benefits: You can treat an @UUID[Compendium.pf1.armors-and-shields.Item.mJYWI4VZBo0c0CCC]{armored coat} as light armor. This choice must be made when you don the armor, and can’t be changed until you remove and redon the armor.

You must still be proficient in wearing medium armor to avoid adding the armor’s check penalty on all attack rolls and skill checks that involve moving.

devoted healer.name: Devoted Healer
devoted healer.description:
Raised in the company of skilled healers, you were always encouraged to devote your time and energy to the welfare of others.

Benefits: Whenever you take 20 on a Heal check to treat deadly wounds, you restore an additional 1d4 hit points to those you aid.

Suggested Characters

Battle clerics, Iomedaeans, Kellids.

contextNotes.text: When you take 20 to treat deadly wounds, you restore an additional [[1d4]] hit points to those you aid.

kuthite caster (zon-kuthon).name: Kuthite Caster (Zon-Kuthon)
kuthite caster (zon-kuthon).description:
Requirements: Zon-Kuthon

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Concentration checks when casting spells with the darkness, pain, or shadow descriptors.

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus when casting spells with the darkness, pain, or shadow descriptors.

giant-blooded (giantslayer).name: Giant-Blooded (Giantslayer)
giant-blooded (giantslayer).description:
Your family has always been dogged by rumors that a bit of giant blood got into the family’s veins at some point. Whether this was through alchemical or magical experimentation, or because your great-great-grandfather married a giant, it has made you big for your race, and may have given you other minor cosmetic features of giants, such as flaming red hair, a bluish tinge to your skin, or oversized hands.

Benefits: When you wield a weapon that is larger than your size, the penalty on attack rolls for using inappropriately sized weapons is reduced by half. In addition, you gain a +2 trait bonus to your CMD against awesome blow combat maneuvers. If you’re a dwarf, your stability racial trait applies to awesome blow combat maneuvers as well.

contextNotes.text: The penalty on attack rolls for using inappropriately large-sized weapons is reduced by half. (see page 140 of core rulebook)
+[[2]] Trait bonus to your CMD against awesome blow combat maneuvers. If you’re a dwarf, your stability racial trait applies to awesome blow combat maneuvers as well.

stealthy escape.name: Stealthy Escape
stealthy escape.description:
You are adept at escaping from confinement in an unobtrusive manner.

Benefits: When trying to escape manacles, rope, or other similar restraints (but not grapples or similar attacks), you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of your Escape Artist modifier. If you free yourself, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to pretend that you are still bound.

contextNotes.text: When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound
When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound
When escaping restraints (but not grapples) you may make a Sleight of Hand check instead of Escape Artist check. if you succeed, you gain +[[2]] to Bluff to pretend to still be bound

dtang ma bloodline (dtang ma).name: Dtang Ma Bloodline (Dtang Ma)
dtang ma bloodline (dtang ma).description:
As you were born in Dtang Ma and possess one of the favored bloodlines, your sorcerous powers are particularly potent.

Requirements: Dtang Ma

Benefits: Select one of the following sorcerer bloodlines: fey, maestro, starsoul, or stormborn. Once per day, you may use one of your bloodline powers as if your sorcerer level were 1 higher than normal. This trait does not give you access to bloodline powers whose level requirements you do not yet meet.

unhinged mentality (lamashtu).name: Unhinged Mentality (Lamashtu)
unhinged mentality (lamashtu).description:
You have goddess-granted madness.

Requirements: Lamashtu

Benefits: This madness gives you a +2 trait bonus on saves against confusion, insanity, and fear effects.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against confusion, insanity, and fear effects.

weathered patience (human; kellid).name: Weathered Patience (Human; Kellid)
weathered patience (human; kellid).description:
You had to learn to control your attention to survive in the wilds.

Requirements: Kellid Human Heritage

Benefits: Once per day, when you ready an action to make a ranged or melee weapon attack, you can add a +4 trait bonus on the attack.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, when you ready an action to make a ranged or melee weapon attack, you can add a +[[4]] Trait bonus  on the attack.

suicidal (tiefling).name: Suicidal (Tiefling)
suicidal (tiefling).description:
Shame and horror fill your subconscious, and you never stop looking for ways to grant yourself the peace of the grave.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: Once per day, as an immediate action, you can make yourself the target of any attack originally directed against a creature occupying an adjacent square.

light-bringer (sarenrae).name: Light-Bringer (Sarenrae)
light-bringer (sarenrae).description:
You were born with a blessing of the Dawnflower.

Requirements: Sarenrae

Benefits: Once per day, you can use light as a spell-like ability. Your caster level is equal to your character level.

heedful readiness.name: Heedful Readiness
heedful readiness.description:
Your years of meditation and mindfulness allow you to act correctly on a moment’s notice.

Benefits: Once per day, you can add your Wisdom modifier to an initiative check.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can add your Wisdom modifier ([@abilities.wis.mod]) to an initiative check.

enduring mutagen.name: Enduring Mutagen
enduring mutagen.description:
Because of special training, your unique body chemistry, or the uncovering of an alchemical secret, your mutagens last longer.

Benefits: The bonuses and penalties granted by your mutagens last for 1 additional minute per alchemist level.

Usage: Increase mutagen duration for 1 minute per alchemist level.

loner of the rocks (oread).name: Loner of the Rocks (Oread)
loner of the rocks (oread).description:
Feeling harried by flighty non-oreads, you chose to embrace the life of a hermit with few contacts beyond your rocky home.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Heal and Survival checks. Your bonus on Survival checks increases by 1 in underground or mountain environments.

contextNotes.text: Your [trait] bonus on checks increases by 1 in underground or mountain environments.

inciter (hobgoblin).name: Inciter (Hobgoblin)
inciter (hobgoblin).description:
You witnessed or were part of a feud that turned close friends into hateful enemies.

Requirements: Hobgoblin

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to convince others that their allies have wronged them and on Diplomacy checks to persuade others to betray their allies’ trust.

contextNotes.text:
+[[2]] Trait bonus 
to convince others that their allies have wronged them .
+[[2]] Trait bonus to persuade others to betray their allies’ trust.

deadeye bowman (erastil).name: Deadeye Bowman (Erastil)
deadeye bowman (erastil).description:
Requirements: Erastil

Benefits: When you are using a longbow, if only a single creature is providing soft cover to your target, your target does not receive the +4 bonus to AC.

contextNotes.text: When using a longbow, if only a single creature is providing soft cover to your target, your target does not receive the +4 bonus to AC.

jungle native (mwangi expanse; grippli).name: Jungle Native (Mwangi Expanse; Grippli)
jungle native (mwangi expanse; grippli).description:
Your people have called the jungles home for generations, and they are extremely proficient in moving about in that terrain.

Requirements: Grippli native to the Mwangi Expanse

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against diseases and poisons, a +1 trait bonus on initiative checks attempted in jungle terrain, and Survival is a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against diseases and poisons.
+[[1]] Trait bonus in jungle terrain.

resolve of the rejected.name: Resolve of the Rejected
resolve of the rejected.description:
Some disagree with your choice to wield a firearm, and their scorn has only hardened your resolve in battle.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against charm and compulsion effects. Also, once per day when you succeed at a saving throw against such an effect, you regain 1 grit point.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against charm and compulsion effects

nidalese shadowcaster (nidal).name: Nidalese Shadowcaster (Nidal)
nidalese shadowcaster (nidal).description:
You have studied with the feared shadowcasters of Nidal.

Requirements: Nidal

Benefits: Choose one spell with the shadow descriptor - from this point on, whenever you cast this spell, its effect manifest at +1 caster level.

Usage: Select one spell with the shadow descriptor when you take this trait.

Edit the chosen spell. In the Offsets Section>Caster Level Offset box enter a 1

god scorn (tiefling; foulspawn).name: God Scorn (Tiefling; Foulspawn)
god scorn (tiefling; foulspawn).description:
Your contempt for the gods and their sad little priests makes it easier to shake off the effects of their prayers.

Requirements: Foulspawn Tiefling Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divine spells.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against divine spells.

conscientious miner (jinin).name: Conscientious Miner (Jinin)
conscientious miner (jinin).description:
You were one of the mithral miners of Jinin, and learned how to extract the delicate ore as well as determine its value.

Requirements: Jinin

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, and a +1 trait bonus on Profession (miner) checks. In addition, Profession (miner) becomes a class skill for you.

Usage

Update the Skills tab of your Actor to add the Profession (miner) skill.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect Profession (miner).

Update the Class skills section of the details tab of this trait to reflect Profession (miner).

fortified drinker (cayden cailean).name: Fortified Drinker (Cayden Cailean)
fortified drinker (cayden cailean).description:
Cayden Cailean's holy brews invigorate your mind, making you less susceptible to mental attacks.

Requirements: Cayden Cailean

Benefits: Whenever you imbibe any alcoholic beverage, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saves against mind-affecting effects for 1 hour.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus against mind-affecting effects for 1 hour whenever you imbibe any alcoholic beverage.

bandit (river kingdoms).name: Bandit (River Kingdoms)
bandit (river kingdoms).description:
Since you were young, you've been a member of one River Kingdoms bandit gang or another.

Requirements: River Kingdoms

Benefits: Choose one of the following skills: Escape Artist, Intimidate, or Stealth. You gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill, and it is always a class skill for you.

Usage

Select Escape Artist, Intimidate, or Stealth when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

fencer.name: Fencer
fencer.description:
You trained long hours as a youth with blades, either taking lessons in the genteel art of fencing from tutors paid for by your parents or by being taken under the wing of a disenfranchised fencer who may have turned to a life of crime.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack of opportunity attack rolls made with daggers, swords, and similar bladed weapons.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on attacks of opportunity made with daggers, swords, and similar bladed weapons.

civilized.name: Civilized
civilized.description:
You are well versed in the local laws, customs, and politics.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks and Knowledge (local) checks. Knowledge (local) is always a class skill for you.

toxophilite (aasimar; plumekith).name: Toxophilite (Aasimar; Plumekith)
toxophilite (aasimar; plumekith).description:
You've inherited some of your celestial ancestor's prowess with the bow.

Requirements: Plumekith Aasimar Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on attack rolls made to confirm critical hits with bows.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus on attack rolls made to confirm critical hits with bows.

jadwiga scion (human; jadwiga).name: Jadwiga Scion (Human; Jadwiga)
jadwiga scion (human; jadwiga).description:
You come from a family that commands respect.

Requirements: Jadwiga Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks related to the Irrisen aristocracy.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus  on  checks related to the Irrisen aristocracy.

affinity for the elements (any elemental.name: Affinity for the Elements (any Elemental Lord)
affinity for the elements (any elemental.description:
Requirements: Any Elemental Lord

Benefits: Add 1 to the DC of saving throws made to resist the effects of spells cast by you that have either the air, earth, fire, or water descriptor, depending on which elemental lord you worship. You must choose a single elemental lord when you take this trait; once chosen, it cannot be changed.

Usage: Choose a single Elemental lord which your character venerates. Each lord is associated with an elemental plane. Spells you cast with the descriptor of the associated plane are at +1 DC.

Manually add +1 to the spell DC of any spell with the selected descriptor.

fleshwarp exposure (drow).name: Fleshwarp Exposure (Drow)
fleshwarp exposure (drow).description:
Your body responds strongly to transmutations because you were exposed to fleshwarping magic.

Requirements: Drow

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against transmutation spells and effects. Transmutations you willingly accept affect you as though they were cast at 1 caster level higher for the purpose of determining duration.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against transmutation spells and effects.
Transmutations you willingly accept affect you as though they were cast at 1 caster level higher for the purpose of determining duration.

stargazer (iron gods).name: Stargazer (Iron Gods)
stargazer (iron gods).description:
They say the strange technological ruins scattered throughout Numeria came from the skies several thousand years ago. The concept of life on other planets far beyond Golarion has always fascinated you, and you’ve long hoped to learn more about what life on those other planets may have been like. You’ve heard stories about the strange alien creatures found in Numerian dungeons and hope to learn all you can about them—perhaps some of these aliens can be found in the caverns below Torch!

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge checks to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks, and this skill is a class skill for you. You are treated as if you possessed the Technologist feat for the purposes of resolving checks to identify an alien creature using a Knowledge skill and for all Knowledge (geography) checks. If you already possess the Technologist feat, then your trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) checks increases to +3.

Usage: If you have or gain the Technologist feat, then Update the bonus on the Change on the changes tab of this trait relating to Knowledge (geography) from +1 to +3.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses. You are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat for all checks.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.
+[[2]] Trait bonus (and you are treated as if you have the Technologist Feat) to identify alien monsters’ abilities and weaknesses.

seeker.name: Seeker
seeker.description:
You are always on the lookout for reward and danger.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and Perception is always a class skill for you.

apprentice.name: Apprentice
apprentice.description:
During your studies of The Majestic Book of the Prime Ascended, you learned some minor magical tricks.

Benefits: Select a single 0-level spell from the sorcerer/ wizard spell list. You can cast this spell 1 time per day as a spell-like ability.

Usage: When you add the spell to the spellbook, you can adjust the "0/0" display to be "1/1", change the "Casts Per Day Used" formula to 1, then change the spellbook's spell slots to match.

snowstepper (gnome).name: Snowstepper (Gnome)
snowstepper (gnome).description:
As a native of the North, you have acquired the ability to tread lightly on snow.

Requirements: Gnome

Benefits: You ignore difficult terrain caused by snow, and it costs you only 2 squares of movement to enter a square covered in heavy snow, rather than 4 squares of movement. This benefit only applies when you are not carrying a medium or heavier load.

athletic (ruins of azlant).name: Athletic (Ruins of Azlant)
athletic (ruins of azlant).description:
You have always had a knack for physical activity. You either grew up in a rural area and had an active childhood where you were always climbing trees, swimming in lakes and rivers, and clambering up rocky hillsides, or you competed in and excelled at contests or sports while growing up in a larger settlement. Due to this background, little can slow you down or inhibit your movements. When the Bountiful Venture Company interviewed you, they noticed your stature and physicality, and they chose you for the colonial expedition knowing that a strong back is always helpful in a growing colony.

Benefits: You reduce your armor check penalty by a number equal to one-third your character level (minimum 1) for purposes of Acrobatics, Climb, and Swim checks, and you gain a +1 trait bonus to one of these three skills, chosen when you take this trait.

Usage: Select Acrobatics, Climb, or Swim when you take this trait.

Update the target of the change on the Changes tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

contextNotes.text: You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].
You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].
You reduce your armor check penalty by [[max(1, floor(@attributes.hd.total/3))]].

destined diplomat.name: Destined Diplomat
destined diplomat.description:
Your relationship with your eidolon gives you some clout with other outsiders.

Benefits: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks toward outsiders, and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you.

contextNotes.text: +[[2]] Trait bonus toward outsiders.

gifted smuggler (ostenso).name: Gifted Smuggler (Ostenso)
gifted smuggler (ostenso).description:
You have a knack for hiding goods on your person.

Requirements: Ostenso

Benefits: Any small object you attempt to hide on your body is treated as an extraordinarily small object for the purpose of Sleight of Hand checks.

contextNotes.text: Any small object you attempt to hide on your body is treated as an extraordinarily small object. (normally a +4 bonus). .

stoic dignity (oread).name: Stoic Dignity (Oread)
stoic dignity (oread).description:
You are an unmoving rock for those who see you as an authority figure.

Requirements: Oread

Benefits: As long as you are conscious, you and all allies within 10 feet gain a +1 bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting effects you are not already suffering from. This is a trait bonus for you and a morale bonus for your allies.

contextNotes.text: As long as you are conscious, +[[1]] Trait bonus  against mind-affecting effects you are not already suffering from.   All allies within 10 feet gain a +[[1]] Morale bonus against these same effects.

ichimeiyo champion.name: Ichimeiyo Champion
ichimeiyo champion.description:
You draw strength from adhering to the Ichimeiyo honor code in combat.

Benefits: Once per day, if an effect would compel you to harm an ally, abandon an ally, or break your word, you can attempt a Will save at the usual DC to end the effect. If the effect normally allows a Will save at this point, you can roll twice and take the better result.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, if an effect would compel you to harm an ally, abandon an ally, or break your word, you can attempt a Will save at the usual DC to end the effect. If the effect normally allows a Will save at this point, you can roll twice and take the better result.

mivoni duelist (mivon).name: Mivoni Duelist (Mivon)
mivoni duelist (mivon).description:
Your training in Aldori sword fighting included several bouts in the Sevier, which has taught you how to inflict further punishment in one-on-one fights.

Requirements: Mivon

Benefits
You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls when you are the only one threatening your opponent.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on damage rolls when you are the only one threatening your opponent.

pomp and pageantry (halfling; taldor).name: Pomp and Pageantry (Halfling; Taldor)
pomp and pageantry (halfling; taldor).description:
Though others think you merely waste time, you know that those extra flourishes and ceremonial touches actually make your work just that much better.

Requirements: Halfling; Taldor

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics, Diplomacy, Handle Animal, Intimidate, Perform, and Ride checks with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.
+[[1]] Trait bonus with class skills if you spend twice as long as it normally takes to make that check.

no escape.name: No Escape
no escape.description:
Struggle as they might, ne’er-do-wells and vagrants are hard pressed to evade the law once in your clutches.

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks to lawfully and nonlethally restrain a creature you’ve witnessed commit a crime.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus to lawfully and nonlethally restrain a creature you’ve witnessed commit a crime

spirit lodge dreamer (human; erutaki).name: Spirit Lodge Dreamer (Human; Erutaki)
spirit lodge dreamer (human; erutaki).description:
You have experienced visions of the unseen spirit world, and bear the marks of the spirits upon your flesh.

Requirements: Erutaki Human Heritage

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saves against illusions, and reduce any miss chance you would take from concealment by 10%.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus against illusions.
Reduce any miss chance you would take from concealment by 10%.

tempter's tongue (tiefling).name: Tempter's Tongue (Tiefling)
tempter's tongue (tiefling).description:
The blood of crafty, bargain-making fiends runs in your veins, and you have a talent for brokering deals of your own.

Requirements: Tiefling

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks and on opposed Charisma checks to influence creatures you have charmed (such as with charm person).

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] Trait bonus on opposed checks to influence creatures you have charmed.

frostborn (lands of the linnorm kings).name: Frostborn (Lands of the Linnorm Kings)
frostborn (lands of the linnorm kings).description:
Long nights in the frigid winters of the north have inured you to cold.

Requirements: Lands of the Linnorm Kings

Benefits: You gain a +4 trait bonus on any savings throws made to resist the effects of cold environments, as well as a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against cold effects.

contextNotes.text: +[[4]] Trait bonus to resist the effects of cold environments.
+[[1]] Trait bonus against cold effects.

formerly mind-swapped (strange aeons).name: Formerly Mind-Swapped (Strange Aeons)
formerly mind-swapped (strange aeons).description:
You awake with a strange sensation beyond the frightening experience of extensive memory loss. Full recollections of the experience—like so many others—have been wiped from your mind, but at some point in your past your mind was swapped with that of a yithian, an alien being from beyond time and space. You don’t remember details of your experiences wandering the yithians’ peculiar city in a foreign body— and even worry whether this might be some strange hallucination— but every so often, a flash of insight strikes you as a result of this experience. You know that you can rely on these alien flashbacks during your investigation into your current situation, as it gives you greater perspective into an otherwise confusing world.

Benefits: Once per day, you can reroll one Knowledge check that you have just failed. In addition, you can attempt untrained Knowledge checks with DCs up to 20 instead of 10.

contextNotes.text: Once per day, you can reroll one check that you have just failed.  ([[@resources.formerlyMindswappedStrangeAeons.value]] remaining uses). You can attempt untrained checks with DCs up to 20.

obscure traditions (elf; snowcaster).name: Obscure Traditions (Elf; Snowcaster)
obscure traditions (elf; snowcaster).description:
You confound those who think they know about elves.

Requirements: Snowcaster Elf heritage

Benefits: Any creature attempting to make a Knowledge check about your people, a Sense Motive check to determine whether you are lying, or a Survival check to track you takes a –2 penalty on the check. Additionally, any character or creature that normally gains a bonus on attack or damage rolls against elves (such as a ranger’s favored enemy ability) has such a bonus reduced by 1 (minimum 0).

contextNotes.text: Any  character or creature that normally gains a bonus on attack or damage rolls against elves (such as a ranger’s favored enemy ability) has such a bonus reduced by 1 (minimum 0).
Any creature attempting to make a Sense Motive check to determine whether you are lying takes a -2 penalty on the check.
Any creature attempting to make a Survival check to track you takes a -2 penalty on the check.

star reader (sodden lands).name: Star Reader (Sodden Lands)
star reader (sodden lands).description:
You are one of the few remaining descendants of the lost civilization of Lirgen. Growing up learning of your people’s history has granted you a fine understanding of celestial divination as well as a deep-seated hatred of the demon-worshiping monsters that have come to rule your ancestral lands.

Requirements: Sodden Lands

Benefits: While under starlight, the caster level of all your divination spells is increased by 1. If the target of your spell is a demon, the caster level is increased by 2.

contextNotes.text: +[[1]] to caster level for all divination spells cast while under starlight.
+[[2]] to caster level for all spells that target a demon.

merchant of katheer (qadira).name: Merchant of Katheer (Qadira)
merchant of katheer (qadira).description:
You grew up among the market stalls of the greatest trading post in all the world, and can almost smell the value of an item before you touch it.

Requirements: Qadira

Benefits: You gain a +1 trait bonus to Appraise checks, and Appraise is always a class skill for you.

blessed touch.name: Blessed Touch
blessed touch.description:
You may have been raised in a devout family, studied the divine in a formal church environment, or even learned how to combine traditional healing techniques with those of divine casters. In so doing, you have focused yourself into being the perfect vessel for your deity. Divine power flows through you like a mountain stream, making your healing touch more potent than that of others.

Benefits: You heal 1 additional point of damage when using lay on hands, channeling energy, or casting a cure spell.

contextNotes.text: You heal 1 additional point of damage when using lay on hands, channeling energy, or casting a cure spell.

sustaining performance (the shackles; ba.name: Sustaining Performance (The Shackles; bard)
sustaining performance (the shackles; ba.description:
Abandoned by a traditional healer at a critical time, you improvised a tale or jokes to keep up the spirits of someone in dire health.

Requirements: Bard who hails from The Shackles or who has lived there for at least 1 year

Benefits: Once per day as a standard action, you can attempt a DC 15 Perform check with an audible component (such as comedy, oratory, sing, or with any instrument) to stabilize a dying creature that can hear you within 30 feet. You can also attempt Perform checks instead of Heal checks to provide long-term care.

contextNotes.text: You can attempt Perform checks instead of Heal checks to provide long-term care.
You can attempt Perform checks instead of Heal checks to provide long-term care.

natural-born leader (uc).name: Natural-Born Leader (UC)
natural-born leader (uc).description:
You've always found yourself in positions where others look up to you as a leader, and you can distinctly remember an event from your early childhood where you led several other children to accomplish a goal that each of you individually could not.

Benefits: All cohorts, followers, or summoned creatures under your leadership gain a +1 morale bonus on Will saves to avoid mind-affecting effects. If you ever take the @UUID[Compendium.pf1.feats.Item.R3a1OV18RwDJftvq]{Leadership} feat, you gain a +1 trait bonus to your Leadership score.

secrets of the sphinx (scarab sages).name: Secrets of the Sphinx (Scarab Sages)
secrets of the sphinx (scarab sages).description:
Your ancestors paid the proper obeisance to Nethys, who granted their heirs special divinatory gifts.

Requirements: Scarab Sages

Benefits: Once per day, you may gain a +2 trait bonus on any single Knowledge check. Additionally, choose one Knowledge skill—this skill becomes a class skill for you.

Usage: Select any one Knowledge skill when you take this trait.

Update the Class skills section of the Details tab of this trait to reflect your choice.

contextNotes.text: Once per day,  +[[2]] Trait bonus on any single check. ([[@resources.secretsOfTheSphinxScarabSages.value]] remaining uses).
Once per day,  +[[2]] Trait bonus on any single check. ([[@resources.secretsOfTheSphinxScarabSages.value]] remaining uses).
Once per day,  +[[2]] Trait bonus on any single check. ([[@resources.secretsOfTheSphinxScarabSages.value]] remaining uses).
